title: Entity Health Bars
description:
A Datapack which adds health bars to nearby entities.
Also adds Damage Numbers/Indicators!
body:
# ENTITY HEALTH BARS
This Datapack adds health bars and damage/heal/absorption indicators to all entities in the world.\
You have to be within 20 Blocks of the entity before they take damage/heal in order to activate the health bars and indicators.

![A Husk taking damage, showcasing a Damage Indicator and a Health Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f097c05fae1729b7ca33de5fe725ccaf0c474c4_0.webp)

Indicator colors:
- **Red**: Damage
- **Green**: Heal
- **Yellow**: Gained Absorption
- **Dark Purple**: Lost Absorption

Size of the health bars scale with entity max health, up to 40 segments for entities with 40HP or higher.

Using a mod like [Player Ladder](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-ladder) allows the Health Bar to appear on players (Number Indicators still work on players regardless of whether or not this mod is installed)

**Health Bars and Indicators will not show up on entities under the effects of Invisibility**

Toggle if health bars and damage numbers are visible through walls via:\
`/scoreboard players set #aolu_hb aolu_hb_see_through x` 
  - set x to 1 or below for see through (default setting)
  - set x to 2 or above for not see-through
